description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the ruby:2.3 Docker image and a before_script that runs bundle install. Define two stages: test and deploy, and set the JEKYLL_ENV variable to production. In the test stage add a test job that executes bundle exec jekyll build -d test, stores the test directory as an artifact, and runs on all branches except the source branch. In the deploy stage add a pages job that runs bundle exec jekyll build -d public, publishes the public directory as a GitLab Pages artifact, and only runs on the source branch.
